mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_kpi_plan WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_kpi_plan WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_kpi_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_kpi_plan WHERE deleted = 0
AND (indicator_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR department LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR responsible_person LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND indicator_type = #{indicatorType}
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ehs_kpi_plan ( plan_year, indicator_type, indicator_name, description, department, responsible_person, measurement_period, unit, target_value, current_value, achievement_rate, status, start_date, end_date, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{planYear}, #{indicatorType}, #{indicatorName}, #{description}, #{department}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{measurementPeriod}, #{unit}, #{targetValue}, #{currentValue}, #{achievementRate}, #{status}, #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{notes}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_kpi_plan SET plan_year = #{planYear}, indicator_type = #{indicatorType}, indicator_name = #{indicatorName}, description = #{description}, department = #{department}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, measurement_period = #{measurementPeriod}, unit = #{unit}, target_value = #{targetValue}, current_value = #{currentValue}, achievement_rate = #{achievementRate}, status = #{status}, start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ehs_kpi_plan SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
